summary: Iteration 3 hero section replacement testing completed successfully. All 18 features tested and verified working correctly. NEW 'Lifetime Iron Miles' hero with '4,820' mileage replaces old 'Chicago → Denver' route hero. Chicago and Denver text COMPLETELY GONE as required. Road/highway visual elements with lane dashes visible. All other sections preserved from iteration 2. 100% success rate maintained.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Should use 'boxShadow' instead. Same as iterations 1 & 2.
react_native_issues.impact: No functional impact - just console warnings. Future React Native versions may require boxShadow syntax.

action_items: Optional: Update shadow* style props to boxShadow syntax to eliminate deprecation warnings (low priority, no functional impact - same as previous iterations)
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Hero section successfully replaced: 'Current Route / Chicago → Denver' → 'Lifetime Iron Miles / 4,820'
✅ '4,820' mileage number from driverData.lifetimeMiles displayed prominently (line 158)
✅ Chicago and Denver text COMPLETELY REMOVED from codebase - verified by code review and UI testing
✅ Road/highway visual element with lane dashes implemented (lines 163-181)
✅ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, SafeAreaView)
✅ All styles use StyleSheet.create() - no CSS files
✅ All text properly wrapped in Text components
✅ testID attributes present on all interactive elements for testing
✅ Expo Router navigation working correctly with file-based routing
✅ Color palette consistent throughout (dark/graphite/black with gold accents)
✅ Touch targets are appropriately sized for mobile interaction
✅ No structural or behavioral changes - only hero section visual replacement

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend for this UI-only app
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 18 features tested and working after hero section replacement

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - hardcoded placeholder data in driverData object in index.tsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 hero section replacement completed successfully. The 'Current Route / Chicago → Denver' hero has been completely replaced with 'Lifetime Iron Miles / 4,820' hero. Added road/highway visual elements with lane dashes. Improved asphalt charcoal background. NO structural or behavioral changes - same scaffold, cards, tabs, navigation. All functionality from iterations 1 & 2 preserved at 100% success rate. Same low-priority deprecation warnings for shadow* props remain.

✅ Header shows 'IRON MILES' title in gold color with decorative double gold lines

✅ NEW Hero section shows '4,820' as large mileage number (focal point)
✅ NEW Hero section shows 'MILES' unit text
✅ VERIFIED: Chicago text is COMPLETELY GONE from the screen
✅ VERIFIED: Denver text is COMPLETELY GONE from the screen
✅ NEW Road/highway visual element visible in hero section with lane dashes
✅ Mile shields still show 'MILE 27' and 'MILE 50' with green gradient and gold borders
✅ Welcome section still shows 'Welcome, Driver!' in gold text with small green shield
✅ Generate Workout CTA button visible with green gradient background and gold border
✅ Tapping Generate Workout button navigates to /generate-workout screen
✅ Back button on Generate Workout screen returns to Dashboard
✅ Current Miles card shows '+27 Miles Earned' with gold progress bar
✅ Last Workout card shows 'Upper Body' and '+10 Miles'
✅ Quick Stats card shows 65 Workouts, 8,450 Steps, 720 Calories
✅ 4-tab bottom navigation with medallion-style circular icons
✅ Dashboard tab is highlighted/active by default with gold treatment
✅ Tapping Progress Map tab navigates to Progress Map placeholder screen
✅ Tapping Workouts tab navigates to Workouts placeholder screen
✅ Tapping Fuel tab navigates to Fuel placeholder screen
✅ Each placeholder screen shows COMING SOON text with gold styling
✅ Tapping Dashboard tab returns to Dashboard from any placeholder
✅ Scrolling works properly to reveal all dashboard content
